description: Synthetic materials made from polymers, commonly used in packaging.
commonMistakes: Including plastic bags or film (which tangle in sorting machines)
Throwing in black plastic (often undetectable by optical scanners)
facts: A recycled plastic bottle can be turned into clothing, furniture, or another bottle.
It takes up to 500 years for some plastics to decompose in a landfill.
Recycling a single plastic bottle saves enough energy to power a 60W light bulb for 6 hours.
